series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to the inspection of manufactured home parks, excepting inspections performed in response to a complaint or investigation of a potential non-compliance. This record series includes, but is not limited to, annual park inspection reports, verification inspection reports for development and/or flood plain management in parks, flood inspection reports, proof of corrections, extension requests, and associated correspondences.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: record shall be destroyed three years from date of inspection report. ; Paper: If an electronic version of record exists, paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of record does not exist
